summary: Package-level style variables using lipgloss for terminal UI rendering; defines 24 style rules and 5 base colors for all TUI components
notes: Central styling configuration for all TUI rendering. Base colors: primaryColor=#7D56F4 (purple), secondaryColor=#6C6C6C (gray), accentColor=#04B575 (green), errorColor=#FF4672 (red), mutedColor=#626262 (dim). Covers styling for: title/status bars, active/inactive tabs, summary cards (channel names, text, counts), date headers, lists (selected/unselected), help overlays (key/desc), error/confirm dialogs, loading/spinner indicators, source badges, dashboard cards (collapsed/expanded arrows, counts), and filter overlays (borders, title, checkboxes). Pure styling configuration — no state or behavior.
